title: Process of Linearization using Multivariate Taylor Series
description: This flowchart illustrates the step-by-step process of approximating a multivariable function near a point using the first-order Taylor series expansion, which is the foundation for linearization.
relationships: Function is evaluated at a point to find f(a,b)
Gradient is calculated at the point (a,b)
Components are combined into the linearization formula L(x,y) = f(a,b) + f_x(a,b)(x-a) + f_y(a,b)(y-b)
L(x,y) provides a local linear model
The error between f(x,y) and L(x,y) is quantified by higher-order terms
